site.title: Beagley Industries
site.beagle: Beagley Industries was inspired by a long-lived, small companion.
The surname "Small" is an Anglicised form of the Irish, “
”. Although my dog is not a beagle, her likeness was used in an early beer label as a family joke. The idea proved too good to discard, and became the basis for the name and logo.
site.who.1: Systems and platform engineer experienced in high-performance, large-scale environments, with a foundation in biology and chemistry including biosynthetic pathway elucidation and conducting polymer—hydrogel systems.
site.who.2: Experience includes 15 years in high-impact operational environments (BHP, ASD), working with large-scale systems under real constraints.
site.who.3: I design, build, and troubleshoot complex systems across software, hardware, and experimental domains.
